}
.nav-drawer-link.active .num { color: var(--green-light); }

/* ─── Main Layout ─── */
main {
  max-width: 880px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(32px, 5vw, 56px) clamp(16px, 5vw, 32px) 100px;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* ─── Section ─── */
.section {
  margin-bottom: clamp(56px, 8vw, 88px);
  animation: riseIn 0.5s ease-out both;
}

@keyframes riseIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.section-label {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.section-num {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  border: 1px solid;
}
.n-green  { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); background: var(--green-glow); }
.n-amber  { color: var(--amber); border-color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-glow); }
.n-terra  { color: var(--terra); border-color: var(--terra); background: var(--terra-glow); }
.n-sage   { color: var(--sage);  border-color: var(--sage);  background: rgba(92,122,78,.1); }
.n-blue   { color: var(--blue);  border-color: var(--blue);  background: var(--blue-glow); }

.section-tag {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--ink-4);
}

.section-title {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -1px;
  color: var(--ink);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  word-break: break-word;
}

.section-sub {
  color: var(--ink-3);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  max-width: 600px;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* ─── Divider ─── */
.divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--border-strong) 30%, var(--border-strong) 70%, transparent);
  margin: clamp(36px, 5vw, 56px) 0;
  position: relative;
}
.divider::after {
  content: '◆';
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 0 10px;
  color: var(--ink-4);
  font-size: 0.55rem;
}

/* ─── Card ─── */
.card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: clamp(18px, 4vw, 28px);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  transition: border-color 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
}
.card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-strong);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
}

.card-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.card-ico {
  width: 42px; height: 42px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-elevated);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.card-title {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--ink);
}

.card p, .card li {
  color: var(--ink-3);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.card ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; }
.card ul li {
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 18px;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.card ul li::before {
  content: '→';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: var(--green);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

/* ─── Table ─── */
.tbl-wrap { overflow-x: auto; margin: 12px 0; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; }
table.styled {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  min-width: 420px;
}
table.styled th {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--ink-3);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
table.styled td {
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--ink-3);
  vertical-align: top;
}
table.styled td:first-child {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--green);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
table.styled tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
table.styled tbody tr:hover { background: var(--bg-elevated); }

/* ─── OS Tabs ─── */
.tab-strip {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2px;
  background: var(--bg-elevated);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  padding: 3px;
  width: fit-content;
  max-width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.tab-btn {
  padding: 7px 16px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--ink-3);
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  transition: all 0.18s;
  white-space: nowrap;
  touch-action: manipulation;
}
.tab-btn:hover { color: var(--ink); }
.tab-btn.active {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  color: var(--green);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.os-panel { display: none; }
.os-panel.active { display: block; }

/* ─── Code Block ─── */
.code-block {
  position: relative;
  background: var(--bg-code);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  margin: 14px 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
}
.code-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 9px 16px;
  background: var(--bg-code-alt);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  gap: 8px;
}
.code-lang {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.copy-btn {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 5px 12px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  background: transparent;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  touch-action: manipulation;
  min-height: 32px;
}
.copy-btn:hover { border-color: rgba(74,140,65,0.6); color: #7DC96E; }
.copy-btn.ok    { border-color: rgba(74,140,65,0.8); color: #7DC96E; }
.code-body {
  padding: clamp(12px, 3vw, 18px) clamp(14px, 3vw, 22px);
  overflow-x: auto;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}
.code-body pre {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 1.8vw, 0.82rem);
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #D4C9B8;
  white-space: pre;
  margin: 0;
}
.c  { color: #5A6E44; }
.kw { color: #7DC96E; }
.fl { color: #E8A94B; }
.st { color: #7ABFE8; }
.ou { color: #64748B; font-style: italic; }
.pr { color: #C07AB8; }
.nu { color: #E87070; }

/* ─── Steps ─── */
.steps { margin: 4px 0 24px; }
.step {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.step-track {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  padding-top: 2px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.step-dot {
  width: 30px; height: 30px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  color: var(--ink-3);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.step-dot.on {
  border-color: var(--green);
  background: var(--green-glow);
  color: var(--green);
}
.step-line {
  width: 2px;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 20px;
  background: var(--border);
  margin: 5px 0;
}
.step-body { flex: 1; padding-bottom: 12px; min-width: 0; }
.step-h {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--ink);
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.step-p {
  color: var(--ink-3);
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ─── Info Boxes ─── */
.box {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  margin: 16px 0;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--ink-2);
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.box .ico { flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; font-size: 1rem; }
.box strong { font-weight: 700; }
.box.tip   { background: var(--green-glow); border: 1px solid rgba(45,90,39,.2); }
.box.warn  { background: var(--amber-glow); border: 1px solid rgba(200,130,10,.2); }
.box.ok    { background: rgba(45,90,39,.06); border: 1px solid rgba(45,90,39,.18); }
.box.info  { background: var(--blue-glow);  border: 1px solid rgba(14,116,144,.2); }
code.ic {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.8em;
  background: rgba(45,90,39,.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(45,90,39,.2);
  color: var(--green);
  padding: 1px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

/* ─── Model Cards ─── */
.model-card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  transition: all 0.25s;
}
.model-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-strong);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.model-card-top {
  padding: clamp(16px, 3vw, 24px) clamp(16px, 4vw, 28px) 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.model-name {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.35rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.model-chips { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.chip {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 2px 9px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  background: var(--bg-elevated);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
  color: var(--ink-3);
}
.model-body {
  padding: clamp(14px, 3vw, 20px) clamp(16px, 4vw, 28px) clamp(16px, 3vw, 24px);
}
.model-desc {
  color: var(--ink-3);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* ─── Test Questions ─── */
.test-q {
  background: var(--bg-elevated);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-left: 3px solid;
  border-radius: 0 var(--radius-xs) var(--radius-xs) 0;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.test-q-num {
  font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.test-q-text {
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  color: var(--ink-2);
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* ─── Accordion ─── */
.accordion {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.accordion-trigger {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 15px 20px;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: var(--ink);
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
  gap: 12px;
  transition: background 0.2s;
  touch-action: manipulation;
  min-height: 48px;
}
.accordion-trigger:hover { background: var(--bg-elevated); }
.accordion-icon {
  color: var(--ink-4);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  transition: transform 0.3s;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.accordion.open .accordion-icon { transform: rotate(180deg); }
.accordion-body {
  max-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: max-height 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}
.accordion.open .accordion-body { max-height: 6000px; }
.accordion-inner {
  padding: 4px 20px 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

/* ─── Back to Top ─── */
.back-top {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 24px; right: 24px;
  width: 44px; height: 44px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
  color: var(--ink-3);
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(12px);
  transition: all 0.3s;
  z-index: 90;
}
.back-top.show { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
.back-top:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); }

/* ─── Footer ─── */
footer {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 40px 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
  color: var(--ink-4);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
}
footer a { color: var(--green); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; }
footer a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.footer-inner {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.footer-brand {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--ink-2);
}

/* ─── Colour accents per model ─── */
.accent-llama   { color: #2D5A27; }
.accent-deepseek { color: #8B5CF6; }
.accent-gemma   { color: #C8820A; }
.accent-qwen    { color: #B5441E; }
.accent-mistral { color: #0E7490; }

.bl-llama    { border-left-color: #2D5A27; }
.bl-deepseek { border-left-color: #8B5CF6; }
.bl-gemma    { border-left-color: #C8820A; }
.bl-qwen     { border-left-color: #B5441E; }
.bl-mistral  { border-left-color: #0E7490; }

.tq-llama    { color: #2D5A27; }
.tq-deepseek { color: #8B5CF6; }
.tq-gemma    { color: #C8820A; }
.tq-qwen     { color: #B5441E; }
.tq-mistral  { color: #0E7490; }

/* ════════════════════════════════════════
   RESPONSIVE
════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .nav-hamburger { display: flex; }
  .nav-brand-year { display: none; }
  .hero h1 { letter-spacing: -1px; }
  .hero-eyebrow { font-size: 0.65rem; text-align: center; }
  .model-card-top { flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
  .model-card:hover { transform: none; }
  .back-top { bottom: 16px; right: 16px; width: 44px; height: 44px; touch-action: manipulation; }
  .step { gap: 12px; }
  .step-dot { width: 26px; height: 26px; font-size: 0.65rem; }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  table.styled { font-size: 0.78rem; }
  table.styled th, table.styled td { padding: 8px 10px; }
  .tab-btn { padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.72rem; }
  .tab-strip { width: 100%; }
  .accordion-trigger { font-size: 0.82rem; padding: 13px 16px; }
  .accordion-inner { padding: 4px 14px 16px; }
  .hero-platforms { gap: 8px; }
  .platform-pill { padding: 7px 14px; font-size: 0.73rem; }
  .box { padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 0.83rem; }
  .card { padding: clamp(14px, 4vw, 20px); }
  .nav-brand-text { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .copy-btn { padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; }
  .hero h1 { letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
}

@media (min-width: 769px) {
  .nav-drawer { display: none !important; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Progress -->
<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" id="pgBar"></div></div>

<header class="hero">
  <div class="hero-eyebrow"><span class="pulse"></span> Complete Implementation Guide — 2026 Edition</div>

  <p class="tagline">Install, configure, and master local LLMs — from your first <code style="font-family:Fira Code,monospace;font-size:.9em;color:var(--green)">ollama run</code> to production-ready API integrations.</p>
  <div class="hero-platforms">
    <span class="platform-pill"><span class="ico">🪟</span> Windows (Native)</span>

  </div>
</header>

<!-- ══════════════════ MAIN ══════════════════ -->
<main>

  <!-- ▸ 01 PREREQUISITES -->
  <section class="section" id="prerequisites">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-num n-green">01</span>
      <span class="section-tag">Getting Ready</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Prerequisites</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Ensure your system meets the requirements and your tools are current before installing Ollama.</p>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head">
        <div class="card-ico">⚙️</div>
        <span class="card-title">System Requirements</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tbl-wrap">
        <table class="styled">
          <thead><tr><th>Requirement</th><th>Minimum</th><th>Recommended</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr><td>RAM</td><td>8 GB</td><td>16 GB+</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Disk Space</td><td>12 GB free</td><td>50 GB+ free</td></tr>
            <tr><td>OS (Windows)</td><td>Windows 10 (1903+)</td><td>Windows 11</td></tr>
            <tr><td>OS (Linux)</td><td>Ubuntu 20.04+</td><td>Ubuntu 22.04 / 24.04</td></tr>
            <tr><td>OS (macOS)</td><td>macOS 12+</td><td>macOS 14+ (Apple Silicon)</td></tr>
            <tr><td>GPU (Optional)</td><td>NVIDIA 6 GB / AMD Radeon</td><td>NVIDIA 8 GB+ / Apple M-series</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head">
        <div class="card-ico">🔧</div>
        <span class="card-title">Update Your System First</span>
      </div>

      <div class="tab-strip" data-group="prereq">
        <button class="tab-btn active" data-os="win">Windows</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-os="linux">Linux / Ubuntu</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-os="macos">macOS</button>
      </div>

      <div class="os-panel active" data-group="prereq" data-os="win">
        <div class="code-block">
          <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">PowerShell</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
          <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Check your Windows version (must be 10 1903+ or 11)</span>
<span class="kw">winver</span>

<span class="c"># Ensure Windows is updated via Settings → Windows Update</span>
<span class="c"># No additional package managers needed — Ollama has a</span>
<span class="c"># native .exe installer that works without Admin rights</span>

<span class="c"># Optional: Install Windows Terminal for a better CLI experience</span>
<span class="kw">winget</span> install Microsoft.WindowsTerminal</pre></div>
        </div>
        <div class="box tip">
          <span class="ico">🪟</span>
          <div><strong>No WSL needed!</strong> Ollama runs natively on Windows 10/11. The installer is a simple <code class="ic">.exe</code> that doesn't require Administrator privileges. It auto-starts in your system tray.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="os-panel" data-group="prereq" data-os="linux">
        <div class="code-block">
          <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Bash — Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
          <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Update package lists and upgrade installed packages</span>
<span class="kw">sudo</span> apt update && <span class="kw">sudo</span> apt upgrade <span class="fl">-y</span>

<span class="c"># Install essential tools</span>
<span class="kw">sudo</span> apt install <span class="fl">-y</span> curl wget git

<span class="c"># Verify curl is installed</span>
<span class="kw">curl</span> <span class="fl">--version</span></pre></div>
        </div>
        <div class="box tip">
          <span class="ico">💡</span>
          <div><strong>Why <code class="ic">sudo</code>?</strong> Many install commands need root privileges to write to system directories. The <code class="ic">sudo</code> prefix temporarily elevates your permissions and will prompt for your password.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="os-panel" data-group="prereq" data-os="macos">
        <div class="code-block">
          <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Bash — Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
          <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Install Homebrew if you don't have it</span>
<span class="kw">/bin/bash</span> <span class="fl">-c</span> <span class="st">"$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"</span>

<span class="c"># Update Homebrew and install essentials</span>
<span class="kw">brew</span> update
<span class="kw">brew</span> install curl wget git

<span class="c"># Verify macOS version</span>
<span class="kw">sw_vers</span></pre></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- ▸ 02 INSTALLATION -->
  <section class="section" id="installation">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-num n-amber">02</span>
      <span class="section-tag">Setup</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Install Ollama</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Ollama runs natively on all three platforms — no virtual machines required. Pick your OS below.</p>

    <div class="tab-strip" data-group="install">
      <button class="tab-btn active" data-os="win">🪟 Windows (Native)</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" data-os="linux">🐧 Linux / Ubuntu</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" data-os="macos">🍎 macOS</button>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ WINDOWS NATIVE ═══ -->
    <div class="os-panel active" data-group="install" data-os="win">
      <div class="box info">
        <span class="ico">🎯</span>
        <div><strong>Native Windows — No WSL required.</strong> Ollama installs as a native Windows application with full NVIDIA and AMD Radeon GPU support. It runs in the background via system tray, and the CLI works in CMD, PowerShell, or Windows Terminal.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="steps">
        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">1</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Download the Installer</div>
            <div class="step-p">Grab <code class="ic">OllamaSetup.exe</code> from the official site. No admin rights needed.</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Browser or PowerShell</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Option A: Open in browser</span>
<span class="st">https://ollama.com/download/windows</span>

<span class="c"># Option B: Download via PowerShell</span>
<span class="kw">Invoke-WebRequest</span> <span class="fl">-Uri</span> <span class="st">"https://ollama.com/download/OllamaSetup.exe"</span> <span class="fl">-OutFile</span> <span class="st">"OllamaSetup.exe"</span></pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">2</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Run the Installer</div>
            <div class="step-p">Double-click <code class="ic">OllamaSetup.exe</code> and click <strong>Install</strong>. The setup takes about 30 seconds. After installation, you'll see the 🦙 Ollama icon appear in your Windows system tray (bottom-right corner). The server starts automatically.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">3</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Verify in Terminal</div>
            <div class="step-p">Open <strong>Command Prompt</strong>, <strong>PowerShell</strong>, or <strong>Windows Terminal</strong> and run:</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">CMD / PowerShell / Windows Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Check Ollama version</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> <span class="fl">--version</span>
<span class="ou"># Expected: ollama version 0.x.x</span>

<span class="c"># Test the server is responding</span>
<span class="kw">curl</span> http://localhost:11434
<span class="ou"># Expected: Ollama is running</span></pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">4</div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Run Your First Model!</div>
            <div class="step-p">That's it — you're ready. Pull and run a model right away:</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">ollama</span> run llama3.2
<span class="ou"># Downloads the model (~2 GB) then opens interactive chat</span>
<span class="pr">>>> </span><span class="st">Hello! Tell me about yourself.</span></pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="box ok">
        <span class="ico">✅</span>
        <div><strong>Health Check</strong> — Open <code class="ic">http://localhost:11434</code> in your browser. You should see <em>"Ollama is running"</em>. The API and CLI both use port 11434.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="accordion">
        <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
          <span>📂 Windows File Locations & Uninstall</span>
          <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="accordion-inner">
            <p style="color:var(--ink-3);font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:10px;">Ollama stores files in these Windows locations. Press <kbd style="font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.8em;padding:2px 6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border-strong);border-radius:3px;">Win+R</kbd> and paste these paths:</p>
            <div class="tbl-wrap">
              <table class="styled">
                <thead><tr><th>Path</th><th>Contains</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>%LOCALAPPDATA%\Ollama</td><td>Logs (app.log, server.log) and downloaded updates</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>%LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Ollama</td><td>Binaries (auto-added to your user PATH)</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>%HOMEPATH%\.ollama</td><td>Downloaded models and configuration</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
            <p style="color:var(--ink-3);font-size:.86rem;margin-top:12px;">To <strong>change model storage location</strong>, set the <code class="ic">OLLAMA_MODELS</code> environment variable via Windows Settings → "Environment variables". To <strong>uninstall</strong>, use Settings → Add or remove programs → Ollama.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="box tip">
        <span class="ico">⚡</span>
        <div><strong>GPU Acceleration</strong> — Ollama automatically detects and uses NVIDIA (CUDA) and AMD Radeon GPUs on Windows. No additional driver setup needed beyond having your standard GPU drivers installed.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ LINUX ═══ -->
    <div class="os-panel" data-group="install" data-os="linux">
      <div class="steps">
        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">1</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Run the Official Install Script</div>
            <div class="step-p">This single command downloads and installs Ollama, sets up the systemd service, and configures everything automatically.</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">curl</span> <span class="fl">-fsSL</span> https://ollama.com/install.sh | <span class="kw">sh</span></pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">2</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Verify the Installation</div>
            <div class="step-p">Confirm Ollama is installed and the systemd service is running.</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Check Ollama version</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> <span class="fl">--version</span>
<span class="ou"># Expected: ollama version 0.x.x</span>

<span class="c"># Check the service status</span>
<span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl status ollama
<span class="ou"># Should show: ● ollama.service — active (running)</span></pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">3</div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Enable Auto-Start on Boot</div>
            <div class="step-p">Ensure Ollama starts automatically every time your machine boots.</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl enable ollama
<span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl restart ollama</pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="box ok">
        <span class="ico">✅</span>
        <div><strong>Quick Health Check</strong> — Open your browser and visit <code class="ic">http://localhost:11434</code>. You should see <em>"Ollama is running"</em>.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ macOS ═══ -->
    <div class="os-panel" data-group="install" data-os="macos">
      <div class="steps">
        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">1</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Download Ollama</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Option A — Homebrew</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">brew</span> install ollama</pre></div>
            </div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Option B — Direct Download</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">open</span> https://ollama.com/download</pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">2</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Install & Launch</div>
            <div class="step-p">If using the .zip download, extract it and move <strong>Ollama.app</strong> to your Applications folder, then launch it — the llama icon will appear in your menu bar.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">3</div></div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-h">Verify Installation</div>
            <div class="code-block">
              <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
              <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">ollama</span> <span class="fl">--version</span>

<span class="c"># Test that the server is responsive</span>
<span class="kw">curl</span> http://localhost:11434
<span class="ou"># Expected: Ollama is running</span></pre></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="box tip">
        <span class="ico">🍎</span>
        <div><strong>Apple Silicon Advantage</strong> — M1/M2/M3/M4 Macs automatically use the Metal GPU for acceleration. Zero extra drivers or configuration needed.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- ▸ 03 SIGN IN -->
  <section class="section" id="signup">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-num n-sage">03</span>
      <span class="section-tag">Account</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Sign In to Ollama</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Sign-in unlocks pushing custom models to the registry and accessing Ollama Cloud. Completely optional for pulling and running public models.</p>

    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">1</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-h">Create an Account</div>
          <div class="step-p">Visit <a href="https://ollama.com" style="color:var(--green);font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">ollama.com</a> and click <strong>Sign Up</strong>. You can register with your email or GitHub account.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">2</div><div class="step-line"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-h">Authenticate via CLI</div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Any Terminal (Windows / Linux / macOS)</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Authenticate with your Ollama account</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> signin</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot on">3</div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-h">Explore the Model Library</div>
          <div class="step-p">Hundreds of models at <a href="https://ollama.com/library" style="color:var(--green);font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">ollama.com/library</a> — from 1B parameter pocket models to 70B+ powerhouses.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="box tip">
      <span class="ico">🔓</span>
      <div><strong>No account needed for most tasks.</strong> Pull and run any public model anonymously. Sign-in is only required to push your own custom models to the Ollama registry or to use Ollama Cloud features.</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- ▸ 04 CLI -->
  <section class="section" id="cli">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-num n-terra">04</span>
      <span class="section-tag">Command Line</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">CLI Deep Dive</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Every Ollama command you'll ever need — identical across Windows, macOS, and Linux.</p>

    <div class="box info">
      <span class="ico">🔄</span>
      <div><strong>Same CLI everywhere.</strong> All <code class="ic">ollama</code> commands work identically in Windows CMD/PowerShell, macOS Terminal, and Linux bash. The examples below work on all platforms.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head">
        <div class="card-ico">⌨️</div>
        <span class="card-title">Complete Command Reference</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tbl-wrap">
        <table class="styled">
          <thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>What It Does</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr><td>ollama serve</td><td>Start the Ollama server (port 11434 by default)</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama run <model></td><td>Download (if needed) and start interactive chat</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama pull <model></td><td>Download a model without starting it</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama ls</td><td>Show all locally downloaded models with sizes (alias: <code class="ic">ollama list</code>)</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama ps</td><td>Show currently loaded / running models in memory</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama show <model></td><td>Display model details — parameters, template, license</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama stop <model></td><td>Unload a model from memory</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama rm <model></td><td>Permanently delete a model from disk</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama cp <src> <dst></td><td>Clone a model under a new name</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama create -f <Modelfile></td><td>Create a custom model from a Modelfile</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama push <model></td><td>Push a custom model to the Ollama registry</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama launch</td><td>Configure and launch integrations (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Droid)</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama signin</td><td>Sign in to your Ollama account</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama signout</td><td>Sign out of your Ollama account</td></tr>
            <tr><td>ollama --version</td><td>Display installed Ollama version</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>🚀 Essential CLI Workflow — Hands-On Practice</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Any Terminal (Works on All OS)</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Step 1: Ensure the server is running</span>
<span class="c"># Windows: It auto-starts via system tray</span>
<span class="c"># Linux:   sudo systemctl start ollama</span>
<span class="c"># macOS:   Open the Ollama app, or run:</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> serve &

<span class="c"># Step 2: Pull some models</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> pull llama3.2:1b        <span class="c"># Meta Llama 3.2  — ~1.3 GB</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> pull gemma3:4b          <span class="c"># Google Gemma 3  — ~3.3 GB</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> pull deepseek-r1:8b     <span class="c"># DeepSeek R1     — ~4.9 GB</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> pull qwen3:7b           <span class="c"># Qwen 3          — ~4.4 GB</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> pull mistral            <span class="c"># Mistral 7B      — ~4.1 GB</span>

<span class="c"># Step 3: List downloaded models</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> ls
<span class="ou"># NAME              ID            SIZE      MODIFIED</span>
<span class="ou"># llama3.2:1b       a80c4f17...   1.3 GB    just now</span>

<span class="c"># Step 4: Start an interactive session</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> run llama3.2:1b
<span class="pr">>>> </span><span class="st">Hello! What can you help me with?</span>

<span class="c"># Step 5: In another terminal — check what's loaded</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> ps

<span class="c"># Step 6: Show model details</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> show llama3.2:1b

<span class="c"># Step 7: Unload when done</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> stop llama3.2:1b</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>💬 Interactive Mode — Slash Commands</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <p style="color:var(--ink-3);font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:14px;">Inside an <code class="ic">ollama run</code> session, these slash commands are available:</p>
          <div class="tbl-wrap">
            <table class="styled">
              <thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Action</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody>
                <tr><td>/bye</td><td>Exit the chat session</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/clear</td><td>Clear the conversation context</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/set</td><td>Set session variables (system prompt, parameters, format, verbose, wordwrap, etc.)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/show</td><td>Show model information (info, license, parameters, system, template)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/load <model></td><td>Load a session or switch to a different model</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/save <name></td><td>Save the current session state</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/?, /help</td><td>Show all available slash commands and keyboard shortcuts</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div class="box tip">
            <span class="ico">💡</span>
            <div><strong>Useful <code class="ic">/set</code> sub-commands:</strong> <code class="ic">/set system <msg></code> sets a system prompt, <code class="ic">/set parameter temperature 0.7</code> adjusts creativity, <code class="ic">/set verbose</code> shows token stats, <code class="ic">/set format json</code> enables JSON mode.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>🔧 Environment Variables & Configuration</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">

          <p style="color:var(--ink-2);font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">🪟 Windows</p>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">PowerShell or CMD</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Set environment variables for your user account</span>
<span class="kw">setx</span> OLLAMA_HOST <span class="st">"0.0.0.0"</span>
<span class="kw">setx</span> OLLAMA_ORIGINS <span class="st">"*"</span>
<span class="kw">setx</span> OLLAMA_MODELS <span class="st">"D:\ollama-models"</span>  <span class="c"># Optional: change model storage</span>

<span class="c"># Or via GUI: Settings → search "environment variables"</span>
<span class="c"># → Edit environment variables for your account</span>

<span class="c"># After setting, quit Ollama from system tray and relaunch</span></pre></div>
          </div>

          <p style="color:var(--ink-2);font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;margin:20px 0 10px;">🐧 Linux — systemd service override</p>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Bash</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Edit the Ollama service configuration</span>
<span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl edit ollama

<span class="c"># Add these lines under [Service]:</span>
[Service]
Environment=<span class="st">"OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0"</span>
Environment=<span class="st">"OLLAMA_ORIGINS=*"</span>
Environment=<span class="st">"OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=2"</span>

<span class="c"># Save and reload</span>
<span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl daemon-reload
<span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl restart ollama</pre></div>
          </div>

          <p style="color:var(--ink-2);font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;margin:20px 0 10px;">🍎 macOS — launchctl</p>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>

  <section class="section" id="api">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-num n-terra">07</span>
      <span class="section-tag">Integration</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">API & Python Integration</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Ollama exposes a REST API on port 11434 and provides official Python and JavaScript SDKs for seamless app integration.</p>

    <div class="accordion open">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>🌐 REST API — cURL & PowerShell Examples</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">cURL (Linux / macOS / Windows Terminal)</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">curl</span> http://localhost:11434/api/chat \
  <span class="fl">-d</span> <span class="st">'{
    "model": "llama3.2",
    "messages": [
      { "role": "user", "content": "Explain Docker in 3 sentences" }
    ],
    "stream": false
  }'</span></pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">PowerShell (Windows native)</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># PowerShell equivalent using Invoke-WebRequest</span>
(<span class="kw">Invoke-WebRequest</span> <span class="fl">-Method</span> POST `
  <span class="fl">-Body</span> <span class="st">'{"model":"llama3.2", "prompt":"Explain Docker in 3 sentences", "stream": false}'</span> `
  <span class="fl">-Uri</span> http://localhost:11434/api/generate
).Content | <span class="kw">ConvertFrom-Json</span></pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">List Local Models</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">curl</span> http://localhost:11434/api/tags</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>🐍 Python SDK — Full Integration</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Install SDK</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">pip</span> install ollama</pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">basic_chat.py</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">from</span> ollama <span class="kw">import</span> chat
<span class="kw">from</span> ollama <span class="kw">import</span> ChatResponse

response: ChatResponse = chat(
    model=<span class="st">'llama3.2'</span>,
    messages=[
        {
            <span class="st">'role'</span>: <span class="st">'user'</span>,
            <span class="st">'content'</span>: <span class="st">'Explain microservices vs monolith'</span>,
        },
    ],
)

print(response.message.content)</pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">streaming_chat.py</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">from</span> ollama <span class="kw">import</span> chat

stream = chat(
    model=<span class="st">'gemma3:4b'</span>,
    messages=[{
        <span class="st">'role'</span>: <span class="st">'user'</span>,
        <span class="st">'content'</span>: <span class="st">'Write a Python function for binary search'</span>
    }],
    stream=<span class="fl">True</span>,
)

<span class="kw">for</span> chunk <span class="kw">in</span> stream:
    print(chunk[<span class="st">'message'</span>][<span class="st">'content'</span>], end=<span class="st">''</span>, flush=<span class="fl">True</span>)</pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">compare_models.py</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Benchmark the same prompt across multiple models</span>
<span class="kw">from</span> ollama <span class="kw">import</span> chat
<span class="kw">import</span> time

models = [<span class="st">'llama3.2'</span>, <span class="st">'gemma3:4b'</span>, <span class="st">'mistral'</span>]
prompt = <span class="st">"Explain the Observer design pattern with a Python example"</span>

<span class="kw">for</span> model <span class="kw">in</span> models:
    print(f<span class="st">"\n{'='*50}\nModel: {model}\n{'='*50}"</span>)
    start = time.time()
    response = chat(
        model=model,
        messages=[{<span class="st">'role'</span>: <span class="st">'user'</span>, <span class="st">'content'</span>: prompt}],
    )
    elapsed = time.time() - start
    print(response.message.content[:<span class="nu">500</span>])
    print(f<span class="st">"\n⏱ Response time: {elapsed:.1f}s"</span>)</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>📦 JavaScript / TypeScript SDK</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Install</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">npm</span> install ollama</pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">index.mjs</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="kw">import</span> ollama <span class="kw">from</span> <span class="st">"ollama"</span>;

<span class="kw">const</span> response = <span class="kw">await</span> ollama.chat({
  model: <span class="st">"llama3.2"</span>,
  messages: [{
    role: <span class="st">"user"</span>,
    content: <span class="st">"Explain async/await in JavaScript"</span>,
  }],
});

console.log(response.message.content);</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- ▸ 08 TROUBLESHOOTING -->
  <section class="section" id="troubleshoot">
    <div class="section-label">
      <span class="section-num n-sage">08</span>
      <span class="section-tag">Support</span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Troubleshooting</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Quick fixes for the most common Ollama issues across all platforms.</p>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>❌ "connection refused" when running ollama commands</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <p style="color:var(--ink-3);font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:12px;">The Ollama server isn't running. Start it for your platform:</p>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Fix per OS</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># 🪟 Windows — Restart from system tray or Start Menu</span>
<span class="c"># Right-click the Ollama tray icon → Quit, then relaunch</span>
<span class="c"># Or run manually:</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> serve

<span class="c"># 🐧 Linux</span>
<span class="kw">sudo</span> systemctl start ollama

<span class="c"># 🍎 macOS — open the Ollama app from Applications, or:</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> serve</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>🐌 Model responses are very slow</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <p style="color:var(--ink-3);font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:12px;">The model may be running on CPU instead of GPU. Diagnose with:</p>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Diagnose & Fix</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Check processor allocation</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> ps
<span class="ou"># PROCESSOR column: "100% GPU" = good  |  "100% CPU" = slow</span>

<span class="c"># If on CPU, try a smaller model</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> run llama3.2:1b

<span class="c"># Check NVIDIA GPU memory</span>
<span class="kw">nvidia-smi</span>

<span class="c"># Check system RAM</span>
<span class="kw">free</span> <span class="fl">-h</span>          <span class="c"># Linux / macOS</span>
<span class="kw">systeminfo</span>        <span class="c"># Windows (look for "Available Physical Memory")</span></pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>💾 "not enough memory" or "out of memory" error</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">Solutions</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># 1. Stop other running models first</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> stop llama3.2

<span class="c"># 2. Use a smaller variant</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> run llama3.2:1b    <span class="c"># instead of 3b</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> run gemma3:1b      <span class="c"># instead of 4b</span>

<span class="c"># 3. Remove unused models to free disk space</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> rm deepseek-r1:8b

<span class="c"># 4. Audit what's in memory</span>
<span class="kw">ollama</span> ps</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion">
      <button class="accordion-trigger" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">
        <span>🔍 How to view server logs</span>
        <span class="accordion-icon">▼</span>
      </button>
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <div class="accordion-inner">
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">🪟 Windows</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Open log files via Run dialog (Win+R):</span>
<span class="st">%LOCALAPPDATA%\Ollama\app.log</span>      <span class="c"># GUI app log</span>
<span class="st">%LOCALAPPDATA%\Ollama\server.log</span>   <span class="c"># Server log</span>

<span class="c"># Or view in PowerShell:</span>
<span class="kw">Get-Content</span> <span class="st">"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Ollama\server.log"</span> <span class="fl">-Tail</span> 50</pre></div>
          </div>
          <div class="code-block">
            <div class="code-head"><span class="code-lang">🐧 Linux</span><button class="copy-btn" onclick="doCopy(this)">⎘ Copy</button></div>
            <div class="code-body"><pre><span class="c"># Stream live logs</span>
<span class="kw">journalctl</span> <span class="fl">-u</span> ollama.service <span class="fl">-f</span>

<span class="c"># View last 50 lines</span>
<span class="kw">journalctl</span> <span class="fl">-u</span> ollama.service <span class="fl">-n</span> 50</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<!-- Back to Top -->
<button class="back-top" id="backTop" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" aria-label="Back to top">↑</button>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-brand">🦙 Ollama Guide</div>
    <p>Complete Setup & Implementation Guide — 2026 Edition</p>
    <p style="margin-top:6px;">Data sourced from <a href="https://ollama.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">official Ollama documentation</a> and community resources.</p>
    <p style="margin-top:6px;color:var(--ink-4);font-size:0.72rem;">Built for developers, by developers — Windows • Linux • macOS</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
// ── Copy button ──
function doCopy(btn) {
  const text = btn.closest('.code-block').querySelector('pre').textContent;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
    btn.textContent = '✓ Copied';
    btn.classList.add('ok');
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = '⎘ Copy'; btn.classList.remove('ok'); }, 2000);
  });
}

// ── OS Tabs ──
document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const strip = btn.closest('.tab-strip');
    const group = strip.dataset.group;
    const os    = btn.dataset.os;
    strip.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll(`.os-panel[data-group="${group}"]`).forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll(`.os-panel[data-group="${group}"][data-os="${os}"]`).forEach(p => p.classList.add('active'));
  });
});

// ── Accordion ──
function toggleAcc(trigger) {
  trigger.closest('.accordion').classList.toggle('open');
}

// ── Hamburger / Mobile Nav ──
const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn');
const navDrawer    = document.getElementById('navDrawer');

hamburgerBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  const isOpen = navDrawer.classList.toggle('open');
  hamburgerBtn.classList.toggle('open', isOpen);
  hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen);
});

navDrawer.querySelectorAll('.nav-drawer-link').forEach(link => {
  link.addEventListener('click', () => {
    navDrawer.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  });
});

// ── Scroll: progress bar + back-to-top + active nav ──
const pgBar   = document.getElementById('pgBar');
const backTop = document.getElementById('backTop');
const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section');
const navLinks  = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
const drawerLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-drawer-link');

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const scrollY   = window.scrollY;
  const maxScroll = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
  pgBar.style.width = (scrollY / maxScroll * 100) + '%';
  scrollY > 500 ? backTop.classList.add('show') : backTop.classList.remove('show');
}, { passive: true });

const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) {
      navLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
      drawerLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
      const id = e.target.id;
      const activeDesktop = document.querySelector(`.nav-link[href="#${id}"]`);
      const activeMobile  = document.querySelector(`.nav-drawer-link[href="#${id}"]`);
      if (activeDesktop) activeDesktop.classList.add('active');
      if (activeMobile)  activeMobile.classList.add('active');
    }
  });
}, { rootMargin: '-15% 0px -60% 0px' });

sections.forEach(s => io.observe(s));

// ── Staggered fade-in on scroll ──
const riseObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) {
      e.target.style.animationDelay = '0.05s';
      e.target.style.animationPlayState = 'running';
      riseObs.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.08 });

document.querySelectorAll('.section, .model-card, .card, .accordion').forEach(el => {
  el.style.animationPlayState = 'paused';
  riseObs.observe(el);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
